input.meaning: customer product drawing only; no forming process answer

ground_truth.meaning: factory forming process drawing for DIN912 M14 60-140L; withheld from LLM runtime

notes: Original 96-page standard pack is not used as pipeline input.
Page 2 is the 40-60L forming process. Page 3 is the 60-140L forming process used for the length=100 holdout comparison.
